# MuleSoft MuleSoft MCP Servers

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of MuleSoft MCP Servers documentation.
> See [MuleSoft MCP Servers llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/llms-full.txt) for all the MuleSoft MCP Servers documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Getting Started with MuleSoft Platform MCP Server](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/getting-started-platform.md)
- [Getting Started with MuleSoft DX MCP Server](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/getting-started.md)
- [MuleSoft MCP Servers Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/index.md)
- [MuleSoft MCP Servers Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/mulesoft-mcp-server-release-notes.md)
- [MuleSoft Platform MCP Server Tool Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/reference-mcp-tools-platform.md)
- [MuleSoft DX MCP Server Tool Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/reference-mcp-tools.md)
- [Using MuleSoft DX MCP Server](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/using-mulesoft-mcp-server.md)
- [Using MuleSoft Platform MCP Server](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-mcp-server/using-mulesoft-platform-mcp-server.md)
